observations.summary: Aviel advises the boy to seek answers from a tangible power by picking up a stone and naming it.

evidence.quote: If you are still searching for your source, boy, pick up a stone and give it a name. Seek answers from a power you can touch.

observations.notes: This advice suggests a theme of grounding spiritual or existential search in the physical world.

accepted_observations.summary: Aviel advises the boy to seek answers from a tangible power by picking up a stone and naming it.
